cleavage agent: in-gel digested with trypsin overnight at 37 °C
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was set to 27% for HCD.
fractionation method: lysates were sequentially fractionated using buffers of increasing extraction stringency
fragmentation method: The QExactive HF was operated in data-dependent mode where the 15 most intense precursors were selected for subsequent fragmentation.
instrument: analyzed by LC/MS/MS using an Easy nLC 1200 coupled to a QExactive HF mass spectrometer
